item.title: Near-Exceptional Point Degeneracy Enables Multilevel Optical Memory
item.description:
Nature Nanotechnology, Published online: 03 July 2026; doi:10.1038/s41565-026-02191-4

The interplay between thermo-optic nonlinearity and non-Hermitian degeneracy enables a three-state optical memory in silicon photonic crystal platforms.

item.title: Ultrafast, Reconfigurable All-Optical Beam Steering and Spatial Light Modulation
item.description:
Nature Nanotechnology, Published online: 22 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41565-026-02199-w

Resonant light coupling in silicon-based metasurfaces amplifies a typically weak, subfemtosecond optical non-linearity to enable pulse-limited, all-optical beam steering and spatial light modulation for high-speed photonic applications.
